rationale: Based on feedback, reduce dominating penalties, make fuel efficiency continuous, reduce terminal penalty, and add small survival bonus to encourage learning. Keep changes conservative from parent.

components.description: Penalty proportional to horizontal distance from x=0, reduced coefficient to avoid saturation
Penalty for linear and angular velocity magnitude, using absolute values with smaller coefficient
Penalty for deviation from upright angle, reduced coefficient
Continuous penalty proportional to engine firing, increased magnitude to discourage unnecessary use

components.expression: 50.0 * float(obs[6] == 1.0 and obs[7] == 1.0 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.3)
components.description: Bonus when both legs contact, near pad, low velocity, upright, relaxed thresholds

components.expression: -50.0 * float(done and not (obs[6] == 1.0 and obs[7] == 1.0 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.3))
components.description: Penalty for termination without successful landing, reduced magnitude
